title: Reinforcement
description: Reinforcement: The physical reinforcement object containing the ShapeCode(and it's parameters), the diameter and coodinate system. This can be used with a number of Engine methods suchas Centreline and Length.

CoordinateSystem.description: Position and orientation of the Reinforcement in Space. Refer to the description of the shape codes for how they relate to the coordinate system. Cartesian: A three-dimensional Cartesian coordinate system, as defined by a set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors and a common origin point

ShapeCode.description: The ShapeCode object containing the geometrical parameters of the reinforcement bar. IShapeCode: Base interface for all ShapeCode objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
